tasks.label: jest-services-group
tasks.command: npx --prefix mobile-app jest --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles src/__tests__/api.test.ts src/__tests__/authService.test.ts src/__tests__/chatService.test.ts src/__tests__/creditsService.test.ts src/__tests__/historyService.test.ts src/__tests__/mediaService.test.ts src/__tests__/planService.test.ts

tasks.label: jest-services-cd-mobile
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles src/__tests__/api.test.ts src/__tests__/authService.test.ts src/__tests__/chatService.test.ts src/__tests__/creditsService.test.ts src/__tests__/historyService.test.ts src/__tests__/mediaService.test.ts src/__tests__/planService.test.ts

tasks.label: jest-contexts-cd-mobile
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles src/__tests__/authContext.test.tsx src/__tests__/creditsContext.test.tsx

tasks.label: jest-screens-cd-mobile
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles src/__tests__/OTPVerificationScreen.test.tsx src/__tests__/subscriptionPlansScreen.test.tsx src/__tests__/components.test.tsx src/__tests__/navigation.test.ts

tasks.label: jest-screens-group-rerun
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles src/__tests__/OTPVerificationScreen.test.tsx src/__tests__/subscriptionPlansScreen.test.tsx src/__tests__/components.test.tsx src/__tests__/navigation.test.ts

tasks.label: jest-components-alone
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles src/__tests__/components.test.tsx

tasks.label: jest-navigation-alone
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles src/__tests__/navigation.test.ts

tasks.label: jest-full-to-file
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force test-results | Out-Null; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles *> test-results/full.txt; "full_exit=$LASTEXITCODE" | Set-Content test-results/full.exit.txt

tasks.label: jest-full-to-file-rerun
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force test-results | Out-Null; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles *> test-results/full_rerun.txt; "full_rerun_exit=$LASTEXITCODE" | Set-Content test-results/full_rerun.exit.txt

tasks.label: jest-full-to-file-final
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force test-results | Out-Null; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles *> test-results/full_final.txt; "full_final_exit=$LASTEXITCODE" | Set-Content test-results/full_final.exit.txt

tasks.label: jest-full-by-path-no-openhandles
tasks.command: cd mobile-app; npx jest --config jest.config.js --rootDir . --runInBand --watchman=false --runTestsByPath src/__tests__/api.test.ts src/__tests__/authService.test.ts src/__tests__/chatService.test.ts src/__tests__/creditsService.test.ts src/__tests__/historyService.test.ts src/__tests__/mediaService.test.ts src/__tests__/planService.test.ts src/__tests__/authContext.test.tsx src/__tests__/creditsContext.test.tsx src/__tests__/OTPVerificationScreen.test.tsx src/__tests__/subscriptionPlansScreen.test.tsx src/__tests__/components.test.tsx src/__tests__/navigation.test.ts *> test-results/full_bypath.txt; "full_bypath_exit=$LASTEXITCODE" | Set-Content test-results/full_bypath.exit.txt
